title: Comparative characterisation of human and ovine non-aureus staphylococci isolated in Sardinia (Italy) for antimicrobial susceptibility profiles and resistance genes
public_geography: Rete di tre ospedali: Sassari, Nuoro e Ozieri; campioni ovini regionali
notes: 195 NAS isolates: 125 ovine and 70 human; hospitals identified but human denominators not separable by facility; no municipal prevalence.

title: Antimicrobial susceptibility and genotyping of Staphylococcus aureus isolates collected between 1986 and 2015 from ovine mastitis
notes: PubMed record reports ovine mastitis isolates collected between 1986 and 2015; curated as study-level evidence, not regional prevalence.

title: The poultry chain in Sardinia (Italy): monitoring of Salmonella contamination and antibiotic resistance profiles
notes: Study-level food-chain evidence; not regional prevalence.

title: Genomic characterization of Staphylococcus aureus isolated from mastitis in small ruminants in Sardinia, Italy
notes: Study-level small-ruminant mastitis evidence; not regional prevalence.

title: Characterization and antimicrobial resistance of commensal and pathogenic Escherichia coli from pigs in Sardinia (Italy)
notes: Study-level swine evidence; not regional prevalence.

title: Salmonella and Yersinia enterocolitica through the pig meat chain in Sardinia: occurrence, antimicrobial resistance and genetic insight
notes: Study-level food-chain evidence; not regional prevalence.

title: Pathogenic profile and antimicrobial resistance of Escherichia coli, Escherichia marmotae and Escherichia ruysiae detected from hunted wild boars in Sardinia (Italy)
notes: Study-level wildlife/food-chain evidence; not regional prevalence.

title: Hunted Wild Boars in Sardinia: Prevalence, Antimicrobial Resistance and Genomic Analysis of Salmonella and Yersinia enterocolitica
notes: Study-level wildlife evidence; do not generalize prevalence beyond study design.

title: A Whole-Genome Sequencing-Based Approach for the Characterization of Klebsiella pneumoniae Co-Producing KPC and OXA-48-like Carbapenemases Circulating in Sardinia, Italy
notes: Facility-level clinical genomic evidence; Sassari is the hospital location, not patient origin or municipal prevalence.

title: Occult Vancomycin-Resistant Enterococcus faecium ST117 Displaying a Highly Mutated vanB2 Operon
notes: Facility-level cohort of 39 isolates collected in 2013-2018; three vanB2-positive, including one occult isolate missed by the initial Vitek2 result; not municipal prevalence.

title: Nosocomial transmission of carbapenem-resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae in an Italian university hospital: a molecular epidemiological study
notes: Facility-level cohort of 46 invasive KPC-Kp infections observed in 2015-2017; not municipal or regional prevalence.

title: Infection Prevention Control Strategies of New Delhi Metallo-beta-lactamase Producing Klebsiella pneumoniae
notes: Facility-level case report of two independent NDM-producing K. pneumoniae colonizations in 2021-2022; not municipal prevalence.

title: Prevalence, bioserotyping and antibiotic resistance of pathogenic Yersinia enterocolitica detected in pigs at slaughter in Sardinia
notes: Study-level swine slaughter evidence; do not generalize prevalence beyond study design.

title: Occurrence, Characterization, and Antimicrobial Susceptibility of Salmonella enterica in Slaughtered Pigs in Sardinia
notes: Study-level swine slaughter evidence; not regional prevalence.

title: Molecular detection of virulence factors and antibiotic resistance pattern in clinical Enterococcus faecalis strains in Sardinia
notes: Facility-level cohort of 91 clinical isolates from 91 patients; Cagliari is facility location, not patient residence; DOI not present in PubMed.

title: Lakes and lagoons used for drinking water supply and fisheries as sources of potentially pathogenic bacteria and antimicrobial resistance
notes: Site-level 2024 environmental evidence; exact sample coordinates excluded from public outputs.

title: Comparison of genotypic and phenotypic antimicrobial profile in carbapenemases producing Klebsiella pneumoniae
notes: Facility cohort of 109 CR-Kp in 2018-2022; possible overlap with other AOU Sassari KPC/OXA-48 studies; do not sum denominators.

title: High-Risk Clone of Klebsiella pneumoniae Co-Harbouring Class A and D Carbapenemases in Italy
notes: Facility cohort of 127 KPC/OXA-48-positive patients in 2019-2020; 31 invasive infections; possible overlap with other AOU cohorts.

title: Molecular typing of XDR Acinetobacter baumannii strains in an Italian ICU
notes: Sixteen typed XDR isolates inferred from reported PFGE clusters; all resistant to major antibiotics except colistin; collection period unavailable in open abstract.

title: Outbreak of multidrug-resistant Acinetobacter baumannii in an intensive care unit
geography: Ospedale San Francesco, Nuoro, Sardinia, Italy
public_geography: Ospedale San Francesco, Nuoro (sede della struttura)
notes: June 2012 outbreak: ten positive patients and two positive bed headboards; 12 ST31 isolates with blaOXA-51-like and blaOXA-23-like.

title: Comparison of microbiological and molecular diagnosis for identification of respiratory secondary infections in COVID-19 patients and their antimicrobial resistance patterns
notes: Prospective cohort of 70 COVID-19 patients in 2021-2022; oxacillin-resistant S. aureus and carbapenem-resistant K. pneumoniae detected; counts not inferred.

title: Evaluation of mycobacteria infection prevalence and optimization of the identification process in North Sardinia, Italy
geography: North Sardinia health system; AOU Sassari laboratory
public_geography: Sistema sanitario del Nord Sardegna; laboratorio AOU Sassari
notes: Area-wide cohort of 1836 suspected individuals in 2020-2023; 89 MTB-positive and 64 resistant to at least one first-line drug; no municipal split.
